rulings.Case Title: ELPOINT COMPANY LLC VS SHULMAN & ASSOC
rulings.Calendar Matter: For Attorneys Fees And Attorneys Fees On Appeal
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS FEES DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. MOVING PARTY TO PRESENT AT HEARING DETAILED STATEMENT SHOWING HOURS SPENT AND TASKS PERFORMED. ALSO ANY BILLS TO CLIENT MUST BE PROVIDED. ALSO HOURLY RATE OF ALL ATTORNEYS WHO WORKED ON MATTER MUST BE PROVIDED. (NR)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Transer Action; P & A; Declaration; Pos
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO TRANSFER PURSUANT TO CCP 396(B) AND CCP 397 DENIED UNTIMELY AND FAILURE TO SUSTAIN BURDEN. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: MORROW VS ESTATE OF WENDELL F. FINCH
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER OVERRULED. COMPLAINT ALLEGES EXECUTOR HARRINGTON SERVED NOTICE AND INSTIGATED THE UNLAWFUL DETAINER KNOWING THAT PLAINTIFF DID NOT OWE RENT. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: CONS. ADJUSTING VS DRUSSILLA FLOWERS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Leave To File Compulsory Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO FILE CROSS COMPLAINT GRANTED. ARISES OF SAME TRANSACTION AS COMPLAINT AND IS ACCORDINGLY COMPULSORY. (PB)

rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO INTERVENE DENIED. MR. HICKS INTERESTS ARE ADEQUATELY PROTECTED BY EXISTING PARTIES. (PB)
